title: わからせて差し上げますわ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out taking a walk to clear my head when I
glimpse a familiar duo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No... This can't be... The person I'm supposed to meet here is you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
'Scuse me? Rude! Don't you know that Golshi
always keeps her promises, punk?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I can feel chaos permeating the atmosphere
already. But that ends today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I'll show her that I refuse to get led around by
the nose with her antics! Indeed, I shall have the
last laugh!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
By the way, didn't you say something about
getting new shoes? That best-selling pair over
there's supposed to have amazing specs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(The way these conversations go, there's always
something that trips you up. I should try on a
different pair just to be on the safe side...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this blinding rainbow light?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think McQueen would go for the flashy
party shoes. ...Is she getting enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I won't make the same mistake again. I'll
carefully observe my surroundings and avoid
other pitfalls!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait, where are we? Gold Ship, let us backtrack—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Where did she go?! Oh, what should I do? More
to the point, however will I find my way back...

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Attention, customers. We have a lost child.
Mejiro McQueen, your guardian is waiting for you
at the information counter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you ever wander away like that and pin it on me
again, Gold Ship, then so help me!

text_block_list.name: Eager Fan
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me! You're Mejiro McQueen and Gold
Ship, aren't you?! I'm a huge fan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heeey, you've sure got good taste!

text_block_list.name: Eager Fan
text_block_list.text:
You two are always perfectly in sync! I'm looking
forward to seeing the both of you achieve more
great things together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Us? In sync? I could easily spend an hour
expounding upon why that is not the case.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. It's great expectations from fans such
as yourself that allow us to make huge strides
toward our goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(In the end, Gold Ship didn't do anything
untoward. If anything, being so on guard is what
caused me to be caught off guard...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew, what a day. I'm famished. Guess we oughta
get back, huh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. There's still somewhere you want to go,
isn't there?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're like a tuna—you need to keep moving or
else you'll start flopping around for air. I'm sure
this jaunt hardly lived up to your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Staying quiet like this isn't at all like you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep you company until the end, so tell me
what you'd like to do... As long as it remains
within the bounds of common sense, of course!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Well, since you're offering, let's get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: To outer space! And beyond!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why can't you ever be serious?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Throughout the day, I keep spotting the pair, and
it's clear that they're on the same wavelength. I
watch their antics with a smile.
